---
title: "About"
pagetitle: "About — Ben Hall"
---

::: {.hero-banner}

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Ben Hall" class="rounded-circle" width="180">

# Ben Hall

<h2>Entrepreneur · Shopify Specialist · Meta Advertising · AI Product Builder</h2>
<p class="hero-subtitle">Crocker Innovation Fellow · BYU Marriott School of Business '26</p>

<div style="margin-top: 2rem;">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-hall-55a3a0253/" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/benhall1" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
</a>
</div>

:::

## Background

I'm a senior at Brigham Young University's Marriott School of Business studying Entrepreneurial Management. I build and scale e-commerce brands, run high-performing Meta ad campaigns, and develop AI-powered SaaS tools. I've founded multiple businesses, raised over $10,000 in funding, and consistently deliver 3x-10x ROAS on digital advertising.

<div class="stats-row">
<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">2026</div>
<div class="stat-label">Graduating</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">3</div>
<div class="stat-label">Brands Founded</div>
</div>
<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">6-10x</div>
<div class="stat-label">ROAS Delivered</div>
</div>
</div>

## Education

**B.S. Entrepreneurial Management**
Brigham Young University — Marriott School of Business · Apr 2026

- **GPA:** 3.47
- **Crocker Innovation Fellow**
- **Expertise:** Shopify, Canva, Meta Advertising, AI Product Development

## Skills

### Technical

- Shopify storefront development & e-commerce infrastructure
- Meta advertising — creative strategy, campaign optimization, performance analytics
- AI-assisted product development with Claude Code
- Web development and deployment (Next.js, Vercel, GitHub Pages)

### Product & Marketing

- Full-lifecycle product development — R&D to mass production
- Digital marketing strategy & multi-channel campaigns
- Performance metrics analysis & creative iteration
- Fundraising and grant acquisition

## Interests

Outside of work, I'm interested in personal productivity, exploring new technologies, and finding ways to do more with less. I believe the best products come from deeply understanding problems before building solutions.

---

## Resume

<div class="resume-section">

### Download My Resume

<p>Get the full picture of my experience, education, and skills.</p>

<div class="resume-preview">
<i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></i>
<div class="resume-preview-text">
<strong>Ben_Hall_Resume.pdf</strong>
<span>PDF Document</span>
</div>
</div>

<a href="docs/Ben_Hall_Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank" download>
<i class="fa-solid fa-download" style="margin-right: 0.5rem;"></i>
Download Resume
</a>
<a href="docs/Ben_Hall_Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-dark" target="_blank" style="margin-left: 0.5rem;">
<i class="fa-solid fa-eye" style="margin-right: 0.5rem;"></i>
View Online
</a>

</div>

---

## What's Next

I'm looking for opportunities where I can apply my entrepreneurial mindset and product development skills. I'm particularly interested in roles that let me work at the intersection of technology and business—whether that's at a startup, in product management, or building something of my own.

<div class="cta-section">

### Let's Connect

I'm always interested in meeting people who are building interesting things or thinking about hard problems.

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-hall-55a3a0253/" class="btn" target="_blank">
<i class="fab fa-linkedin" style="margin-right: 0.5rem;"></i>
Connect on LinkedIn
</a>

</div>
